Interface Persistence.JdbcProperties

All Known Implementing Classes:
PersistenceConfiguration
Enclosing class:
Persistence
public static interface Persistence.JdbcProperties
Properties used to optimize the interaction with JDBC.
Since:
4.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    JDBC_BATCH_SIZE
    Enable JDBC statement batching by setting a batch size.
    static final String
    JDBC_FETCH_SIZE
    Override the default JDBC fetch size.
    static final String
    LOCK_TIMEOUT
    Default pessimistic lock timeout hint.
    static final String
    QUERY_TIMEOUT
    Default query timeout hint.

  • Field Details

    • JDBC_FETCH_SIZE

      static final String JDBC_FETCH_SIZE
      Override the default JDBC fetch size.
      Since:
      4.0

    • JDBC_BATCH_SIZE

      static final String JDBC_BATCH_SIZE
      Enable JDBC statement batching by setting a batch size.

      This setting is a hint.

      Since:
      4.0
